Container.Name: btop
Container.Overview: btop resource monitor for Unraid. Installs the btop CLI (available over SSH and the web terminal, settings persisted across reboots) and adds a native dashboard tile showing load average, CPU temperature and the top 5 processes by CPU usage, with one-click fullscreen btop in the browser. Auto-updates track upstream btop releases. Requires Unraid 6.12+, x86_64. Note: do not install alongside the NerdTools btop package. btop itself is created by aristocratos — this plugin is an independent Unraid integration that packages the official binary, not an upstream project.
